spk_a.transcript: Well we only have days, not months.

spk_b.transcript: I have no idea how they got this. I specifically told my staff to destroy everything. I can't imagine...

qa_result.question: What is the interactive behavior demonstrated in their respective segments by the speaker who uttered 'Education has been your life's work' and the speaker who uttered 'The truth is, my heart is not in this fight' in the audio? Please select the most appropriate option.
options: A. The former guides in an empathetic manner, while the latter frankly reveals that he is not suited for the current political struggle, and voluntarily expresses his difficulty in continuing to lead the relevant projects

B. The former expresses dissatisfaction with the time-consuming problem of reform raised by the latter, demanding that the latter complete work that originally takes several months within an extremely short period of time
C. The former severely accuses the latter of the serious mistake of leaking documents, ordering the latter to immediately make a public appearance and take full responsibility for all related matters
D. Cannot judge (insufficient evidence)
qa_result.answer_text: The former guides in an empathetic manner, while the latter frankly reveals that he is not suited for the current political struggle, and voluntarily expresses his difficulty in continuing to lead the relevant projects
